value.found_quote: Utilizing Agent Platform Sessions and an Agent Platform Memory Bank to maintain the state of continuous conversations and retrieve persistent, long-term memories, enabling highly personalized and natural user interactions.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes Google's Memory Bank as part of the Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform on Vertex AI. It is described as a managed service used to "store long-term user preferences and facts" that agents can interact with across sessions (generate, ingest, fetch memories). The page also clearly states at the top: "Preview. This feature is subject to the 'Pre-GA Offerings Terms'", confirming it is in Preview (not yet generally available). The claim's description of Memory Bank as storing persistent, long-term user preferences and facts as memories that agents can read and write across sessions is substantiated by the page content.
